milestone: post-layout-driven-restructure: zones renamed, sub-layouts documented, minimal CI scaffolded
wall_ms_note: Slower than pre-restructure (793/791/794 ms) because var/history.jsonl has grown to 184 lines over the session; smoke-bot reads the full tail. Not a code regression — running scripts/dev/local-down.sh && rm var/history.jsonl && local-up.sh restores baseline.

convention_changes.AGENTS_md: dropped 'CI rejects PRs that touch more than one zone'; replaced with 'multi-zone PRs are encouraged for cross-cutting work'
convention_changes.kind_folder_convention: documented in docs/dev/layout.md and per-zone READMEs

evidence.sessionId_threading: every history line for a session shares the same sessionId
